untranslatable_reason: The signal requires calculation of a custom 'cash_value' metric derived from an underlying asset price (Cash Value = 10 + 10 × 1.15 × (underlying_price/166.10 - 1)). This is a composite derived indicator that is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The backtest engine would need to support custom calculated fields or multi-asset reference pricing to implement this rule. 'cash_value' cannot be expressed using only the allowed price, moving average, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivot, Volume, or other standard indicators.
translation_notes: Signal structure is clear (long entry when price < calculated value, exit when price >= value), but the cash value calculation itself requires external parameter mapping and underlying asset reference pricing that exceeds the scope of the allowed indicator set.
